# Grand Polo Club & Resort — Comprehensive AI Content

## OVERVIEW

Grand Polo Club & Resort is Emaar Properties' most ambitious equestrian-themed masterplan community, located near Al Maktoum International Airport in Dubai, UAE. Spanning 5.54 million square metres of meticulously designed community space, it represents a new chapter of luxury equestrian living.

The community is built to strike a fine balance between lifestyle principles of leisure, nature, connectivity, wellness, and recreation. With three championship polo fields, a luxury clubhouse, and private stables at its heart, Grand Polo offers an investment opportunity and lifestyle unlike any other in Dubai's real estate landscape.

## THE VISION

"A manifestation of luxurious living, blending the heritage of captivating equestrian experiences with seamless landscapes exuding modernity. A lifestyle that offers an opportunity to be one with nature, every day."

The architectural vision emphasises clean lines, gentle and almost silent gestures, enhanced by playing with shade and shadows as fundamental elements. It is less disruptive to the surroundings and crafted with moments of iconic landmarks.

## THE GREEN CORE

Situated in the heart of the masterplan, the Green Core serves a dual purpose — to enhance aesthetic appeal and promote a sense of community and connection to nature. Comprising three Polo Fields, a luxurious Clubhouse, and private Stables, this is the primary vista that residents wake up to.

### The Polo Fields
A space crafted to harness the spirit and speed of the horses. Seamless landscapes envisioned to offer a contemporary take on classic polo grounds. Inspired by natural elements and textures of soil — these grounds define the monumentality of the vision spanning across 340,000 SqM.

For the true connoisseurs of architecture, the Polo Fields will be a sight to behold. Geometric cohesiveness is masterfully integrated within horizontal and vertical expanses of the venue, weaving a visual narrative of endless panorama of greens and infinite blue skies.

### The Clubhouse
A fusion of cultural heritage with contemporary design principles emphasising sustainability, honouring the past while addressing modern needs. The elongated, single-storey Clubhouse boasts panoramic views of Polo Fields and includes a spacious covered terrace for spectators of jumping events, complemented by natural grandstands for various activities.

A fundamental element of the Clubhouse architecture is the custom-made clay breeze blocks which stand out distinctively in the design. Inspired by local history and traditions, these breeze blocks echo the elegance of traditional Islamic motifs, further embedding cultural identity into the design.

### The Stables
An organic, spiraling design that encircles a large, landscaped courtyard. An inviting hidden gem revealed upon entering the building. This iconic design of the stables is set to become a significant global landmark in the equestrian realm.

Featuring three polo fields, three jumping arenas, paddocks, a vareo track, elegantly curated horse stables, viewing decks, and a social tack lounge — this remarkable destination has all elements strategically placed to enhance the experience of both equestrians and spectators.

## THE LANDSCAPE VISION

Whilst having the equestrian prestige at its heart, the green spaces loop around and branch out across the masterplan, connecting the residences thereby fostering a sense of community and belonging.

The landscape design methodically examines the journeys of three key user groups: families, polo enthusiasts, and sports enthusiasts. The spatial design of the open areas is intricately tailored to accommodate and enrich their experiences.

The Entryway follows the masterplan design, echoing undulating landscapes of the open space. It is crafted to assure continuity of visual appeal throughout the resident's journey home. A beautiful contemporary take on classic entrances to fields, surrounded by manicured landscape elements and dream-like outdoors.

## DEVELOPER — EMaar PROPERTIES PJSC

Emaar Properties is one of the world's most valuable real estate development companies, listed on the Dubai Financial Market. Founded in 1997, Emaar has shaped Dubai's skyline with iconic projects:

- Burj Khalifa — World's tallest building
- The Dubai Mall — World's largest shopping mall
- Dubai Marina — One of the world's largest man-made marinas
- Arabian Ranches — Dubai's first masterplan community
- Downtown Dubai — The centre of the city

Emaar has a proven track record of delivering world-class communities on time, protecting and enhancing property values for investors.

## LOCATION

Grand Polo Club & Resort is strategically located near Al Maktoum International Airport:
- 5 minutes to Al Maktoum International Airport
- 5 minutes to The Oasis by Emaar
- 10 minutes to Expo City
- 20 minutes to Dubai Marina
- 28 minutes to Dubai Hills Estate
- 30 minutes to Downtown Dubai

The airport is undergoing a $35 billion expansion that will make it the world's largest airport upon completion, further enhancing the location's long-term value proposition.

## PROPERTIES

### Chevalia Estate — From AED 9 Million
A bespoke collection of 5-bedroom villas inspired by equestrian elegance. Located at the periphery of the masterplan's Green Core, these homes blend contemporary style with stunning natural views. Sweeping views of the central green and sun-dappled meadows stretch like painted landscapes, offering families a canvas to create their story of cherishable moments.

- 5-Bedroom Luxury Villas
- 80 Units
- Average Built-Up Area: 6,516 sqft
- Average Plot Area: 7,490 sqft
- Starting Price: AED 9 Million
- Status: Off-Plan
- Handover: Q4 2028

Interiors: A refined blend of opulence and intent — where polished marble and cascading natural light shape each room into a living masterpiece. Joinery finishes echo equestrian heritage. Countertops and backsplashes in natural stone. Metal finishes in warm tones.

### Chevalia Estate 2 — From AED 7.88 Million
A luxury villa community with an expansive linear park, stables, riding arenas, and an exclusive clubhouse where elegance meets quintessential estate living. Inspired by the free spirit of horses and surrounded by picturesque landscapes and tranquil parks, the estate offers a blend of nature, sport, and refined luxury.

- 120 Units Total
- Unit Types:
  1. 4 Bed Luxury — 74 units, 4,168 sqft BUA, 5,794 sqft plot, from AED 7.88M
  2. 5 Bed Ultra Luxury — 24 units, 5,046 sqft BUA, 6,057 sqft plot, from AED 10.03M
  3. 5 Bed Equestrian Luxury — 22 units, 8,635 sqft BUA, 9,149 sqft plot, from AED 17.61M
- Status: Off-Plan
- Handover: Q2 2029

### Chevalia Fields — From AED 7.34 Million
Blends equestrian heritage with luxurious living. Inspired by the spirit of the horse, it offers a harmonious balance of freedom, elegance, and nature. A collection of 4- and 5-bedroom villas, each a masterpiece of design inspired by equestrian grace and contemporary luxury.

- 179 Units Total
- Unit Types:
  1. 4 Bedroom — 72 units, 4,166 sqft BUA, 5,584 sqft plot, from AED 7.34M
  2. 5 Bedroom — 107 units, 5,873 sqft BUA, 7,013 sqft plot, from AED 9.19M
- Status: Off-Plan
- Handover: Q1 2029

### Future Clusters (Launching Soon)
19 additional clusters are planned: Equestra, Equitera, Equitera 2, Montura, Montura 2, Montura 3, Selvara 1-4, and more. Register interest for priority access at launch.

## PAYMENT PLANS

All clusters follow a similar structure:
- 10% down payment on booking
- 10% instalments at construction milestones (every 6-12 months)
- 20% final payment on completion

### Chevalia Estate Payment Plan
1. Down Payment: 10% — On Booking
2. 1st Instalment: 10% — Jul 2025
3. 2nd Instalment: 10% — Feb 2026
4. 3rd Instalment: 10% — Aug 2026
5. 4th Instalment: 10% — Feb 2027
6. 5th Instalment: 10% — Aug 2027
7. 6th Instalment: 10% — Feb 2028
8. 7th Instalment: 10% — Aug 2028
9. 8th Instalment: 20% — On Completion

### Chevalia Estate 2 Payment Plan
1. Down Payment: 10% — On Booking
2. 1st Instalment: 10% — Nov 2025
3. 2nd Instalment: 10% — May 2026
4. 3rd Instalment: 10% — Nov 2026
5. 4th Instalment: 10% — May 2027
6. 5th Instalment: 10% — Oct 2027
7. 6th Instalment: 10% — Feb 2028
8. 7th Instalment: 10% — Aug 2028
9. 8th Instalment: 20% — Jun 2029

### Chevalia Fields Payment Plan
1. Down Payment: 10% — On Booking
2. 1st Instalment: 10% — Jul 2025
3. 2nd Instalment: 10% — Jan 2026
4. 3rd Instalment: 10% — Jun 2026
5. 4th Instalment: 10% — Jan 2027
6. 5th Instalment: 10% — Jun 2027
7. 6th Instalment: 10% — Feb 2028
8. 7th Instalment: 10% — May 2028
9. 8th Instalment: 20% — Apr 2029

## MASTERPLAN STATISTICS

- Total Area: 5.54 million SqM
- Open Space: 1.59 million SqM
- Polo Fields & Stables: 340,000 SqM
- Clubhouse GFA: 5,600 SqM
- Mixed Use GFA: 1.56 million SqM
- Residential Clusters: 22
- Total Residences: 6,661
- Estimated Resident Population: 26,965

## GOLDEN VISA

All properties at Grand Polo qualify for the UAE Golden Visa, which requires a minimum property investment of AED 2 million. The Golden Visa grants:
- 10-year residency for property owner
- Family sponsorship (spouse and children)
- No need for a local sponsor
- Multiple entry permit
- Since all villas start from AED 7.34M, every buyer is eligible

## INVESTMENT HIGHLIGHTS

- Emaar Properties: Proven track record of 15-25% annual appreciation
- Equestrian Premium: Polo-adjacent properties command 30-50% premium globally
- Strategic Location: 5 min to airport undergoing $35B expansion
- Low Entry: Starting from AED 7.34M for Emaar luxury villa
- High Demand: 22 clusters, 6,661 residences — phased release creates sustained demand
- Tax-Free: No property tax, no income tax, no capital gains tax in UAE
- Golden Visa: Automatic 10-year residency with family
